description: An inactive surgical bonebot.  Using this item involves placing it on the ground and activating it.  If reprogrammed successfully, the nurse bot will then identify you as a friendly, roam around or follow you, and assist you in surgeries.  That is, if you can figure out how to reprogram this thing in the first place.

use_action.friendly_msg: The bonebot slowly rises to its full height, each movement accompanied by the sound of snapping sinew.
use_action.hostile_msg: The bonebot slowly rises to its full height, each movement accompanied by the sound of snapping sinew.

description: A broken surgical bonebot.  Could be gutted for parts.
